name: First Time Setup
description: On first open, check uvx is installed and the AWS Pricing MCP server is reachable

then.command: which uvx || pip install uv && echo 'uvx ready' && uvx awslabs.aws-pricing-mcp-server@latest --help > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'AWS Pricing MCP ready' || echo 'Setup issue — see README'
